productContent.fullTitle: Nike Stellar Ride Little Kids' Shoes
productContent.title: Nike Stellar Ride
productContent.subtitle: Little Kids' Shoes
productContent.description:
All the speed, none of the hassle. As fast to pull on as they are in a race, the Stellar Ride lives up to their name, offering a plush feel from the moment you step into them. A full rubber outsole and ComfiRide cushioned midsole help you run comfortably, no matter the surface.


Slipper-Like Comfort

Plush cushioning and a dipped collar make it easy to step into this comfy running shoe.


A Stellar Ride

ComfiRide cushioning feels soft and responsive underfoot. A full rubber outsole provides a grippy feel on more surfaces.


Cool under Pressure

Engineered mesh upper helps your feet breathe while providing the support you need to play at full speed.


Product Details

  • Classic laces
  • Pull loop on tongue
  • Rubber outsole
  • Not intended for use as Personal Protective Equipment (PPE)

content.text: The recycled polyester used in Nike products begins as recycled plastic bottles, which are cleaned, shredded into flakes and converted into pellets. From there, the pellets are spun into new, high-quality yarn used in our products, delivering peak performance with a lower impact on the environment.

In addition to reducing waste, recycled polyester reduces carbon emissions by up to 30% compared to virgin polyester. Nike diverts an average of 1 billion plastic bottles annually from landfills and waterways.

properties.body:
• The recycled polyester used in Nike products begins as recycled plastic bottles, which are cleaned, shredded into flakes and converted into pellets. From there, the pellets are spun into new, high-quality yarn used in our products, delivering peak performance with a lower impact on the environment.
  • In addition to reducing waste, recycled polyester reduces carbon emissions by up to 30% compared to virgin polyester. Nike diverts an average of 1 billion plastic bottles annually from landfills and waterways.

merchProduct.labelName: NIKE DIAMOND GAMER MCS

productContent.fullTitle: Nike Diamond Gamer MCS Baseball Shoes
productContent.title: Nike Diamond Gamer MCS
productContent.subtitle: Baseball Shoes
productContent.description:
Put your velo into overdrive in the Nike Diamond Gamer. Its synthetic materials and foam midsole offer support, comfort and durability. A midfoot saddle offers stability in the box. And a springy plate helps you make athletic plays all over the lot.


Responsive Feel

A refined foam midsole offers a responsive yet durable feel.


Extra Support

The upper is made of a synthetic material for more support and lasting durability. The low collar height offers a comfortable fit.


Lock In

A midfoot saddle offers support and stability. The lacing system within the saddle adds to the lockdown fit.


More Benefits

  • A single plate gives a grounded but stable feel to cut, run, jump and rotate. It’s playable on any surface and comfortable out of the box.
  • Our player-approved Drag-On technology provides lightweight support for toe drags.

properties.altText: Nike Air Max Torch 4 Women's Shoe
Nike Air Max Torch 4 Women's Shoe
Nike Air Max Torch 4 Women's Shoe

merchProduct.labelName: WMNS AIR MAX TORCH 4

productContent.fullTitle: Nike Air Max Torch 4 Women's Shoe
productContent.title: Nike Air Max Torch 4
productContent.subtitle: Women's Shoe
productContent.description:
Carrying a torch for the late-'90s? Straight out of Nike's running vault, the Nike Air Max Torch 4 boasts airy, open mesh and a cage design just like the original. And our iconic Max Air cushioning means comfort with every step.


Benefits

  • Plush and comfortable, Max Air cushioning has just the right amount of support.
  • Airy mesh has a lightweight feel while TPU fingers nod to Air Max icons from the '90s and provide targeted support.
  • Rubber Waffle outsole adds durability, traction and heritage style.

Product Details

  • Padded, low-cut collar
  • Foam midsole
  • Reflective details
  • Not intended for use as Personal Protective Equipment (PPE)

Nike Air Max Origins

Revolutionary Air technology first made its way into Nike footwear in 1978. In 1987, the Air Max 1 debuted with visible Air technology in its heel, allowing fans more than just the feel of Air cushioning—suddenly they could see it. Since then, next-generation Air Max shoes have become a hit with athletes and collectors by offering striking color combinations and reliable, lightweight cushioning.

productContent.subtitle: Big Kids' Baseball Cleats
productContent.description:
In the Diamond Clutch, you can swing and sprint in style and comfort. A softer midsole compared to the previous iteration provides cushioning while the grippy rubber cleats are tailor made for all-out effort plays.


Benefits

  • Synthetic leather on the upper gives you a secure feel, offering a lightweight, breathable option for the season.
  • Nike Fastflex outsole enhances flexibility and lets you move freely.

content.text: The recycled polyester used in Nike products begins as recycled plastic bottles, which are cleaned, shredded into flakes and converted into pellets. From there, the pellets are spun into new, high-quality yarn used in our products, delivering peak performance with a lower impact on the environment.

In addition to reducing waste, recycled polyester reduces carbon emissions by up to 30% compared to virgin polyester. Nike diverts an average of 1 billion plastic bottles annually from landfills and waterways.

properties.body:
• The recycled polyester used in Nike products begins as recycled plastic bottles, which are cleaned, shredded into flakes and converted into pellets. From there, the pellets are spun into new, high-quality yarn used in our products, delivering peak performance with a lower impact on the environment.
  • In addition to reducing waste, recycled polyester reduces carbon emissions by up to 30% compared to virgin polyester. Nike diverts an average of 1 billion plastic bottles annually from landfills and waterways.

merchProduct.labelName: M NP DF NPT 6IN SHORT

productContent.fullTitle: Nike Pro Training Men's Dri-FIT 6" Shorts
productContent.title: Nike Pro Training
productContent.subtitle: Men's Dri-FIT 6" Shorts
productContent.description:
The 6” Nike Pro shorts deliver a smooth, stretchy feel with sweat-wicking Dri-FIT technology to help you stay focused through every rep.


Benefits

  • Nike Dri-FIT technology moves sweat away from your skin for quicker evaporation, helping you stay dry and comfortable.
  • Zippered pockets and an interior pocket fit your necessities.
  • Flat elastic waistband with internal drawcord provides a secure fit.
  • Breathable mesh gusset panel boosts airflow and allows natural movement.
  • Mesh panels on the upper back and sides enhance breathability for cool, comfortable training.

Product Details

  • 6" inseam
  • Body: 89% polyester/11% spandex. Mesh: 100% polyester.
  • Machine wash
  • Imported

productContent.subtitle: Women's Medium-Support Non-Padded Sports Bra
productContent.description:
This sweat-ready bra is here to work. Moisture-wicking and super stretchy, this fabric's adaptive fibers recover its shape quickly—so it's ready to go again whenever you are. Medium support gives you a snug hold that helps keep everything in place.﻿


Benefits

  • Nike Dri-FIT technology moves sweat away from your skin for quicker evaporation, helping you stay dry and comfortable.
  • Non-padded design lets you keep your natural shape.

Product Details

  • Racerback design
  • 72% polyester/28% spandex
  • Machine Wash
  • Imported

merchProduct.labelName: M NK DF MILER KNIT PANT

productContent.fullTitle: Nike Miler Men's Dri-FIT Knit Running Pants
productContent.title: Nike Miler
productContent.subtitle: Men's Dri-FIT Knit Running Pants
productContent.description:
Run without limits. These lightweight Miler pants feature sleek, sweat-wicking knit fabric and just the right amount of flex. Our signature reflective bars and perforated side panels add breathability mile after mile.


Benefits

  • Offering the same performance features, our Challenger collection is now Miler.
  • Nike Dri-FIT technology moves sweat away from your skin for quicker evaporation, helping you stay dry and comfortable.
  • Perforated side panels at the lower legs help add breathability.
  • Elastic waistband with internal drawcord helps provide a secure, distraction-free fit.
  • Back pocket with a hook-and-loop closure pairs with side pockets to provide storage for your essentials.

Product Details

  • Zippers at ankles
  • Reflective details
  • 100% polyester
  • Machine wash
  • Imported
  • Not intended for use as Personal Protective Equipment (PPE)
